I remember that knights have a sort of pattern when moving around the board. They can reach any square given enough moves, but since we're looking for the minimum, I need to find the shortest path. Wait, e7 to g8 is two squares right and one up, yes. Then from g8, the knight can go to h6 or f7 or h6 is a square, but h8 is two squares up from h6? Wait, no.
